label: Exhausted
description: You’ve pushed too long without rest.
effects: −10% or −20% penalty to all tests (Handler decides).
Lose 1D6 WP when exhaustion sets in.
A full night’s sleep cures exhaustion.

label: Stunned
description: You can’t act for the moment.
effects: Cannot act while stunned.
On your turn: CON×5 to recover and act next turn.

label: Suppressed
description: Incoming fire forces you to keep your head down.
effects: Next action must be to find cover or go prone.
You may stifle fear and act normally at the cost of 1 SAN.

label: Pinned
description: You are immobilized by an opponent.
effects: Cannot move; can attempt Escape once per turn.
+20% bonus to melee/unarmed attacks against you.

label: Prone
effects: Movement restricted until you spend a turn standing.

label: Low Willpower (1–2 WP)
effects: −20% penalty to all actions until WP rises above 2.

label: Temporary Insanity
description: Overwhelming stress causes loss of control.
effects: Handler chooses (or you negotiate): Flee, Struggle, or Submit.

label: Panic Attack
effects: −20% to tests during the episode (typical).

label: Sedated
description: Alcohol or sedatives dull your edge.
effects: −20% to skill/stat tests.
+20% to SAN test to sleep or repress an episode (contextual).

label: Stimulated
effects: Temporarily ignore exhaustion penalty.
Additional doses cost 1D6 WP.
Can only be applied while Exhausted

label: Alienated
effects: All CHA or Persuade tests with that NPC automatically fail until the end of the operation.

label: Dead
effects: You have completed the Opera.

label: No Will
description: You collapse from exhaustion at 0 WP.
effects: The Agent might collapse in wracking sobs, or lash out wildly, or simply pass out.
The Handler controls your Agent until WP returns to 1 or higher and describes the reaction.
An Agent with 0 WP cannot succeed at any tests, including SAN tests.
Sooner or later the Agent falls asleep, regardless of any disorders or stimulants, long enough to regain WP.

label: Unconscious
description: You pass out from pain at <2 HP.
effects: An unconscious agent is helpless and can be killed with a single attack without having to roll.
At 3 HP or more (or after an hour passes), the agent regains consciousness.

label: Permanent Insanity
effects: An Agent with 0 SAN becomes the property of the Handler.
